const palettes = [ ['linear-gradient(135deg,#1ABB9C,#169f85)', 'hero-bg.jpg', '2.4 MB'], ['linear-gradient(135deg,#066fd1,#4299e1)', 'team.jpg', '1.8 MB'], ['linear-gradient(135deg,#f59f00,#f76707)', 'sunset.jpg', '3.1 MB'], ['linear-gradient(135deg,#ae3ec9,#d6336c)', 'product.png', '0.9 MB'], ['linear-gradient(135deg,#2fb344,#74b816)', 'forest.jpg', '4.2 MB'], ['linear-gradient(135deg,#d63939,#f76707)', 'fire.jpg', '2.7 MB'], ['linear-gradient(135deg,#17a2b8,#066fd1)', 'ocean.jpg', '5.5 MB'], ['linear-gradient(135deg,#1a2332,#626d7d)', 'night.jpg', '3.3 MB'], ['linear-gradient(135deg,#4263eb,#ae3ec9)', 'aurora.png', '1.2 MB'], ['linear-gradient(135deg,#74b816,#2fb344)', 'meadow.jpg', '2.0 MB'], ['linear-gradient(135deg,#d6336c,#ae3ec9)', 'bloom.jpg', '1.5 MB'], ['linear-gradient(135deg,#f59f00,#d6336c)', 'desert.jpg', '4.8 MB'] ]; document.getElementById('media-grid').innerHTML = palettes.map(([bg, name, size]) => `
${name}${size}
`).join('');
